title: I.Q.R.S
description: End-to-end RAG platform converting unstructured PDF documents into a searchable intelligence layer with fact-grounded, evidence-traceable answers.
overview: I.Q.R.S. is an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform that converts unstructured PDF documents into a searchable intelligence layer. Users ask natural-language questions and receive fact-grounded answers with traceable evidence – not generic chatbot responses.

features.label: PDF Ingestion Pipeline
features.description: Page-wise text extraction with multi-PDF support.

features.label: Smart Chunking
features.description: Sentence-level chunking with configurable overlap for semantic continuity.

features.label: Index Persistence
features.description: FAISS index and chunk store cached to disk. Avoids reprocessing.

features.label: Vector Similarity Search
features.description: Top-K relevant chunks retrieved via dense embedding similarity.

features.label: Grounded Answer Generation
features.description: LLM restricted to retrieved evidence. Hallucination suppressed.

features.label: Evidence Traceability
features.description: Page + line markers, chunk IDs, similarity scores with every answer.

algorithms.name: Document Chunking
algorithms.description: Sentence-based segmentation with word-count bounds and configurable overlap.

algorithms.name: E5-small-v2 Embeddings
algorithms.description: intfloat/e5-small-v2 → dense vector embedding for chunks and queries.

algorithms.name: FAISS Cosine Similarity
algorithms.description: Query vs chunk embedding similarity → Top-K retrieval.

algorithms.name: Grounded Generation (Groq)
algorithms.description: LLM with strict instruction to answer only from context.

modules.name: PDF Processor
modules.responsibility: PDF parsing, chunk generation, embedding, FAISS index creation

modules.name: QA Engine
modules.responsibility: Load index, embed query, retrieve Top-K, generate grounded response

results: Full-stack RAG pipeline from PDF ingestion to grounded QA
Auditable answers with page/line evidence markers
